package.name: vr_teleop_publisher
package.description: VR teleop publisher for the EBiM task-1 MuJoCo simulator. Publishes RAW OpenXR controller state (pose + buttons) per hand; all clutch/servo control math stays in the simulator so the feel is identical to its local VR mode. Needs pyopenxr + an active OpenXR runtime on THIS machine (Quest Link on Windows, WiVRn on Linux).
